---
title: "Mobius strip"
description: "Poetry to the topic of 'escape'"
author: "Veronika Lohmanova"
date: "03/22/2024"
categories:
  - "Creative writing"
draft: true
---

I open my eyes

Only to see the darkness outside.

I open my eyes

Only to feel the coldness inside.

Shall I scream,

Nobody would even blink.

Shall I run,

Pointed to me would be the gun.

I will never leave this ship,

It is just the Mobius strip.

Whenever I look

It is just the same loop.

There is no light.

And I know the reason, right?

I don’t need to be a sage

To say, “I am in a cage”.

It is part of my mind.

That I see every night

Till I close my eyes.
